name: Daoming Optics&Chemical Co.,Ltd
summary: Daoming Optics&Chemical Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells reflective materials in China and internationally. The company offers reflective sheeting and fabrics, vehicle conspicuity tapes, vehicle number plates, and safety garments. It also provides personal and road safety products, finished products, safety vests, release papers, and glass beads. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Yongkang, China.
